calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioners Aye Aye Myint and Maung Thet Tin were present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the minors, Maung Soe Min Shein and Eaint Thiri Lin.
Linhong Tan was placed under oath and served as Mandarin speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Andrea Hon.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Marcus Hon and Allison Hon.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
